items.title: Bitcoin analysis for the next 5 years
items.subtitle: Investment, Cryptomarket cycle breakdown
items.truncated_body_text: As you know, I don’t do short-term speculative trades with Bitcoin. The main reason is that its fundamentals are not well defined yet, and its trend is much slower than that of the stock market. This may sound strange given the difference in their volatilities, but if you watch BTC, what it mostly does is one big, sharp move toward a target, followed by a multi-week range-bound consolidation there.

items.title: A Guide to Reading My Daily Posts
items.social_title: A Guide to Reading My Daily Posts
items.description: Every time you look at tools such as put/call deltas, ratios, or even monitor changes in order flow (e.g., the ratio between selling and buying volume), you get lagging data.
